name: Skala AVPU
description: Assessment kesadaran 4-tingkat cepet. Luwih cepet tinimbang GCS kanggo triase awal.
instructions: Evaluasi tingkat respon paling dhuwur sing dituduhake pasien.

scoring.label: Tandha
scoring.description: Pasien tangi, sadar, lan nanggapi kanthi normal

scoring.label: nyeri
scoring.description: Pasien mung nanggapi rangsangan nyeri (gosok sternum, tekanan kuku)

scoring.label: Ora tanggap
scoring.description: Ora ana respon kanggo rangsangan apa wae - intervensi saluran napas langsung dibutuhake

interpretation.triage: Kritis - risiko saluran napas, GCS biasane <= 8
